titleStmt.title: SII 19.394: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 394. (A.R. No. 391 of 1913.) ERUMBŪR, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT. ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE, KADAMBAVANĒŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This inscription is damaged. It seems to record a gift of some gold ornaments valued at 8 kaḻañju and of 20 kalam of paddy by Visanal Turuvaṅgi a lady resident of Kachchippēḍu, for the maintenance of a perpetual lamp with a daily supply of an uḻakku of oil, in the temple of Śiṟu-Tirukkōyil-Perumānaḍigaḷ at Uṟumūr a dēvadana and brahmadēya village in Nalvayalūr-kūṟṟam. This was left in charge of Kaviśiyaṉ Nānūṟṟuvaṉ Nāgaṉ a servant of the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kopparakecaripanmaṟku yāṇṭu 10 6Āvatu vaṭakarai nalvayalūrkkūṟṟattut tevatāna
prahmateyam Uṟumurc ciṟuttirukkoyilp perumāṉaṭikaḷukku(k kacciṟperumānaṭikaḷukku)
k kacciṟpeṭu(ppeṭu) paṇṭāṭi vicanal turuvaṅkiyeṉ Ivvūrt tirukkoyiluṭaiyaāṉ kaviciyaṉ
nānūṟṟuva ṉākaṉukku nāṉ taṉicu kuṭuttuṭaiya poṉ Ōlai Iraṇṭāṟ poṉ Aṟukaḻañcu Ivaṉukkey kuṭutta
nellukku Olai yiraṇṭāl nellu Irupatinkalamum Ivaṉey koṇṭa kālmāṭṭāṟ poṉ Irukaḻañcukkum
(kkum) Ivaṉoṭicaintu koḷveṉāṉa(ṉoḷ) coṭipā yom kku kaḻañceykālukku kaiyār palicai
ttu nicatam Uḻakkeṇṇaiyāl Oru nantāviḷakkerippa
Digital edition of SII 19.394 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
